mapper.select: {call sp_create_sales_order( #{customerId, mode=IN, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{staffId, mode=IN, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{vehicleVin, mode=IN, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{depositAmount, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{vehicleAmount, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{optionAmount, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{insuranceAmount, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{discountAmount, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{otherAmount, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )}
SELECT order_id, customer_id, staff_id, vehicle_vin, total_amount, deposit_amount, order_status, created_at, delivery_time FROM sales_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT so.order_id, so.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.phone, so.staff_id, so.vehicle_vin, so.total_amount, so.deposit_amount, so.order_status, so.created_at, so.delivery_time FROM sales_order so JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = so.customer_id
ORDER BY so.created_at DESC, so.order_id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order so JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = so.customer_id
